disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, sharp chest pain that is markedly worse on deep inspiration and coughing (pleuritic character), onset ~3 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest pain?
Does anything make the pain worse — breathing, moving, coughing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a sharp, stabbing pain in my ribs and it's much worse every time I breathe in or cough. It came on suddenly a few hours ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unilateral right calf swelling, warmth and tenderness developing over two days, following a 14-hour long-haul flight
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling or pain in your legs?
Have you done any long travel or been immobile recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my right calf has been swollen and sore for a couple of days — since I got off a 14-hour flight. It feels tight and tender.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing, pounding heart and rapid breathing with a sense of air hunger (resting tachycardia and tachypnoea)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel short of breath or like you can't get enough air?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is hammering and I'm breathing really fast — I feel like I can't get enough air even sitting still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Transient presyncope on exertion — near-blackout walking to the bathroom (marker of haemodynamic compromise)
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt faint, dizzy or close to passing out?
What happened when you tried to walk?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I walked to the bathroom I went really lightheaded and nearly blacked out — I had to grab the wall.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low reported oxygen saturation (92%) on a home fingertip oximeter despite the patient reporting no chronic lung disease
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a pulse oximeter or smartwatch that reads your oxygen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My finger clip is reading 92% for my oxygen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent prolonged immobility — a 14-hour international flight two days ago (major provoking risk factor)
trigger_question_examples: Have you travelled recently or had any long periods sitting still?
Any recent surgery, hospital stays or long journeys?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I flew home two days ago, it was a 14-hour flight and I barely moved from my seat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no productive/purulent sputum reported (pertinent negatives against an infective cause)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or chills?
Are you coughing up any phlegm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers, and I'm not coughing anything up — it's just the sharp pain when I breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Diaphoresis and visible respiratory distress observed on video; patient avoiding deep breaths
trigger_question_examples: Can I see you on video?
Are you sweaty or struggling to breathe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm sweaty and really struggling — I keep taking little shallow breaths because a deep breath is agony.
